extracted_by: HivemindMinion (Claude Code) from HivemindOverlord's licensed PoE2 install
schema_notes: Top-level keys: metadata, ascendancy_classes, nodes (dict keyed by node ID string), mastery_effects.
PoE2 0.5 grew the tree by ~32% (3.78 MB -> 4.99 MB; pre-0.5 had ~4094 resolvable nodes, 0.5 has 9605).
known_caveats: Ascendancy nodes extraction returned 0 - the extractor's ascendancy-detection logic did not fire against 0.5 data. The 6 reworked ascendancies (Acolyte of Chayula, Blood Mage, Chronomancer, Gemling Legionnaire, Pathfinder, Witchhunter) and 2 new ones (Martial Artist, Spirit Walker) are NOT yet broken out into per-ascendancy node sets in this extract. Pending follow-up fix.
Stat enrichment uses pre-0.5 reference files (psg_passive_nodes.json, merged_passive_tree.json, passive_tree_positions.json) - structural data is fresh 0.5 but some stat text may be stale.
data_policy: Extracted exclusively from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install via the in-repo extraction pipeline. No third-party wiki / scraped data.
